name: hey-listen-cli
description: system utilities for coding agents — sounds, notifications, toasts, screen overlays, window info, and a fairy
author: Nate Weinert

scripts.build: swiftc -O -swift-version 5 -framework AppKit -framework AVFoundation -framework IOKit -framework CoreGraphics -parse-as-library -target arm64-apple-macosx13.0 Sources/hey-listen/agent_ping.swift -o hey-listen
scripts.build:sign: bun run build && bun run sign
